Flexible Deployment

01

On-Premise

Deploy Pentagon 2000 within your own infrastructure for maximum control, security and internal management.

02

Cloud

Pentagon Upstream delivers Pentagon 2000 through a managed cloud environment hosted on AWS, reducing infrastructure overhead while maintaining enterprise-level capabilities.

03

Browser-Native

Pentagon Aventus is the next generation browser-based experience for Pentagon ERP, designed for modern aviation and MRO operations with simplified accessibility and deployment.

ERP Packages Tailored to Your Business

Pentagon 2000 offers flexible, modular ERP packages designed around operational requirements across MRO, manufacturing, distribution and supply chain environments.

Organizations can expand functionality as operational needs evolve.
